common.title: Next.js Learning Hub
common.description: Interactive feature showcase — {count} demos covering every Next.js 16 feature

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.description: Search pages and demos. Use arrow keys to navigate, enter to select.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: List of keyboard shortcuts available on this site.
shortcuts.hint: Shortcuts are ignored while typing in inputs.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

home.routing_desc: File-based routing, dynamic routes, parallel routes, intercepting routes, and more.
home.data_desc: Server-side fetching, client-side queries, caching, revalidation, and server actions.
home.rendering_desc: Server components, client components, composition patterns, and state management.
home.ui_desc: CSS, images, fonts, metadata, animations, and theming.
home.advanced_desc: Proxy, i18n, auth, draft mode, edge runtime, MDX, and more.
home.config_desc: Environment variables, redirects, headers, CSP, and bundle analysis.
home.api_desc: Route handlers with Hono — REST CRUD, OG image generation, and streaming.

paths.title: Recommended Paths
paths.heading: Pick a learning track
paths.subtitle: Curated sequences ordered by difficulty. Following a track is faster than browsing random demos — especially if you want to grok Next.js 16's core ideas end-to-end.

beginner.title: Next.js Essentials
beginner.description: Build your first pages, meet dynamic routes, learn server-side data fetching and styling.

advanced.title: Power Features
advanced.description: Parallel routes, Server Actions, Streaming, Edge Runtime, Proxy — the real depth of Next.js.
